title: Add team members and mentors hyperlinks in About Us section

requirements.summary: Add 'Our Team Members' hyperlink displaying six team member names in the About section
acceptanceCriteria: A hyperlink appears in the About section with visible text containing all six team member names
The names are formatted as: Pramit, Aaryaman, Vansh, Khushi, Radhika, and Kashish
The hyperlink has appropriate styling consistent with the dental theme

file_operations.description: Add a hyperlink labeled 'Our Team Members' that displays the names Pramit, Aaryaman, Vansh, Khushi, Radhika, and Kashish. Place the hyperlink within the About section content area below the benefits list, styled consistently with the existing dental theme using appropriate text and hover colors from the theme palette. Use an anchor tag with href='#' since no navigation functionality is required per nonGoals.

requirements.summary: Add 'Our Mentors' hyperlink displaying three mentor names in the About section
acceptanceCriteria: A hyperlink appears in the About section with visible text containing all three mentor names
The names are formatted as: Debadip sir, Omkar sir, and Hari sir
The hyperlink has appropriate styling consistent with the dental theme

file_operations.description: Add a hyperlink labeled 'Our Mentors' that displays the names Debadip sir, Omkar sir, and Hari sir. Place the hyperlink adjacent to or below the 'Our Team Members' hyperlink within the About section content area, maintaining consistent styling with the dental theme and existing section structure. Use an anchor tag with href='#' since no navigation functionality is required per nonGoals.
